explanations.1: This assigns the number 33 to COLOR_YELLOW, which is an ANSI color code that terminals use to display yellow text.
explanations.4: The \e[ starts an escape sequence (a special command to the terminal), ${COLOR_YELLOW} inserts the number 33, and \e[0m resets the color back to normal after printing.
explanations.7: The /* at the end of each path means 'delete everything inside this folder, but keep the folder itself' — without the /*, it would try to delete the folder and fail if files were added after the Makefile was written.
